name: Deutsche Internationale Schule Jakarta

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Puspa Widya No. 8, BSD City, Tangerang Selatan 15321, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: German-medium school for the German-speaking community. Small, specialist, niche appeal. German Abitur and Cambridge pathways.
paragraphs: German-medium school for the German-speaking community. Small, specialist, niche appeal. German Abitur and Cambridge pathways.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$2.4K – US$15K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Campus in BSD City, Science laboratories, Library, Sports facilities, Arts and music rooms.

metaDescription: Deutsche Internationale Schule Jakarta (Greater Jakarta). German-medium school for the German-speaking community. Small, specialist, niche appeal. German Abitur and Cambridge pathways.…
